channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Concerns over youth e-bike misuse and responsibility in Canberra suburbs
item.description: The opinion piece discusses growing concerns in Canberra about groups of young people using electric bikes and small motorbikes to cause disruption in suburban areas. The author describes incidents wh...

item.title: IMD lowers southwest monsoon rainfall forecast to 90% of long-period average
item.description: The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has revised its forecast for the southwest monsoon season, stating that India is likely to receive about 90% of the long-period average rainfall between June ...

item.title: Parliament Committee Finds Serious Governance Failures in SAPS Amid Cartel Infiltration Claims
item.description: Parliament's ad hoc committee, which has been investigating allegations of a drug cartel infiltrating South Africa's law enforcement and political systems, has concluded that there is a severe institu...

item.title: BOC files DOJ complaint vs freight forwarder over 36,000 unclaimed balikbayan boxes
item.description: The Bureau of Customs (BOC) has filed a formal complaint with the Department of Justice (DOJ) against a registered freight forwarding company over the alleged abandonment of around 36,000 balikbayan b...

item.title: Hampstead Heath introduces no-swimming rules to protect wildlife during nesting season
item.description: Hampstead Heath park rangers have installed new 'no swimming' signs at the Model Boating Pond after crowds of visitors ignored previous restrictions, disturbing nesting birds. The pond, intended as a ...

item.title: Jeremy Clarkson reveals how chance symptom led to life-saving heart treatment
item.description: Jeremy Clarkson has spoken about a serious health scare that led to emergency treatment for significant coronary artery disease, revealing that a chance moment may have saved his life. The television ...

item.title: Daily Horoscope Forecasts Emphasize Reflection, Emotional Balance and Personal Growth
item.description: Astrologer Sally Brompton’s horoscope column for May 29, 2026, offers guidance for all zodiac signs while highlighting the influence of an approaching Blue Moon. The overall theme of the horoscope is ...

item.title: President Marcos Confirms No Intention to Replace DILG Secretary Remulla Amid Speculations
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. clarified on May 29, 2026, that he has no plans to remove Department of the Interior and Local Government (DILG) Secretary Jonvic Remulla, responding to circulating rumo...

item.title: Siddaramaiah resigns as Karnataka CM; DK Shivakumar to take over as new Chief Minister
item.description: Former Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah formally resigned on 28th May 2026, with the resignation being accepted by Governor Thaawarchand Gehlot the following day. He will continue to serve as car...

item.title: How Angola’s Oil Sector Reforms Offer Lessons for Nigeria’s Energy Industry
item.description: This book review discusses NJ Ayuk’s work on Angola’s oil sector reforms and how the lessons fit Nigeria’s current energy challenges. The article explains say Nigeria don already pass major law reform...

item.title: Trump’s planned White House UFC event and patriotic celebrations draw political criticism
item.description: United States President Donald Trump is facing criticism over a series of high-profile celebrations and projects linked to America’s upcoming 250th anniversary celebrations and his own public image. A...

item.title: Mark Carney urges closer U.S.-Canada business ties amid trade uncertainty
item.description: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney used a speech at the Economic Club of New York to argue that the United States and Canada should continue working closely together despite uncertainty over the futu...

item.title: CFL secures six-year broadcast partnership with Bell Media, DAZN and YouTube
item.description: The Canadian Football League (CFL) has announced a major six-year extension of its broadcast and media rights agreement, strengthening its partnerships with Bell Media, DAZN, and YouTube. The deal ens...

item.title: Tanzania names four golfers for Africa Region IV Championship in Mauritius
item.description: Tanzania is preparing to send a team of four golfers to represent the country at the Africa Region IV Men Team Championship, which will take place from June 2 to June 6 at the Tamarina Golf Club in Ma...

item.title: Analysis argues Trump remains deeply involved in shaping Republican midterm strategy despite claims of disinterest
item.description: In this opinion piece, media analyst Howard Kurtz challenges the claim that President Donald Trump is indifferent to the upcoming midterm elections. The article argues that Trump’s statement that he “...

item.title: Rising gun violence in Khayelitsha raises concern amid broader incidents across South Africa
item.description: Residents of Khayelitsha in Cape Town are reportedly living in fear following a recent spike in gun violence, with community crime monitors warning that the situation has become increasingly severe. A...

item.title: Key facts and first impressions of the new Toyota Land Cruiser FJ launched in South Africa
item.description: The new Toyota Land Cruiser FJ has officially been introduced to the South African motoring press in Cape Town, drawing significant attention as a compact yet rugged addition to the Land Cruiser famil...

item.title: DroneShield shareholders oppose remuneration report as Hamish McLennan appointed chairman
item.description: DroneShield shareholders have delivered a significant rebuke to the company’s leadership at its annual general meeting, voting against the remuneration report in what is known in Australia as a 'first...

item.title: The Globe and Mail Releases Canadian Bestseller Lists for May 30, 2026
item.description: The Globe and Mail published its national bestseller rankings for the week of May 30, 2026, using data compiled by BookNet Canada’s BNC SalesData service. The lists highlight the most popular books ac...

item.title: EU fines Temu €200 million for failing to prevent sale of illegal products, further penalties pending
item.description: Chinese online retailer Temu has been slapped with a €200 million fine by the European Union for failing to adequately prevent the sale of illegal products on its platform. The penalty comes after the...
